contract: page matrix, folded pages, required CRO blocks, image-slot plan, minimum page-count rationale

artifact.summary: Phase 2 PLAN (run v2). Restaurant single-location depth model rebuilt from the fresh Phase 1 research: 38 internal routes (was 35) — the proven menu x occasion x intent families PLUS three research-driven additions: /open-late-cedar-rapids (Captains open to 10-11pm yet absent from every late-night roundup), /catering-cedar-rapids (catering SERP is an open gap — only Popeyes-via-ezCater ranks; complements the catering occasion page with search-intent framing), and /location (one-location truth-assertion page for GEO disambiguation — stale listings still tell AI engines Captains has two locations; this page states the SW address is now Pita Kabab). External ordering links remain CTAs, not pages. Call-only conversion unchanged (restaurant archetype not bound by the auto-dealer CRO gate). Menu ships with owner-confirmed prices; the Gazette-reported sides additions stay OUT until the owner confirms.

checklist.note: Single 1616 1st Ave NE; SW address (now Pita Kabab) excluded; /location page asserts the single-location truth
Menu pages from owner-confirmed menu (sides delta held out pending owner answer); occasions/landings grounded in Phase 0/1 sealed facts
No lead form, single call CTA, no SMS — documented exception, unchanged
SW neighborhood page REJECTED (doorway risk — no genuine service-area facts beyond app delivery); Hiawatha/Robins/late-night-occasion folds carried over; halal/vegetarian still unconfirmed
2 neighborhood pages only (NE Cedar Rapids, Marion) — genuine facts re-validated in Phase 1 (Mound View, Wellington Heights, Coe College, I-380, Hwy 100)

pageMatrixStrategy.model: Restaurant single-location depth: menu-category x occasion x search-intent families, with a genuine-fact neighborhood ring and a GEO truth-assertion page
pageFamilies: Search-intent root landings (8: dish + near-me + soul-food + late-night + catering)
pageMatrixStrategy.crossLinkPlan: Menu sections <-> related occasions <-> matching intent landings; /catering-cedar-rapids <-> /occasions/office-and-party-catering (intent vs occasion framing); /open-late-cedar-rapids -> menu hub + near-me; /location -> contact + about + FAQ (disambiguation cluster); neighborhoods -> menu hub + nearest intent landing; home -> menu hub + top occasions + top intents. Occasions >=4 cross-links, intent landings >=2.
pageMatrixStrategy.sapNote: No service-area SAP pages. A SW-quadrant neighborhood page was considered (research: SW flank lost to rivals) and REJECTED — no genuine local facts beyond city-wide app delivery = doorway risk. SW delivery reach is copy on /fish-and-chicken-near-me instead.

foldedPages.reason: REJECTED at planning: no genuine SW local facts beyond city-wide app delivery — doorway risk; SW reach handled as copy on /fish-and-chicken-near-me
insufficient distinct genuine local facts (carried from prior run)
hours owner-unconfirmed; late-night intent handled by /open-late-cedar-rapids with call-to-confirm caveats instead of an 'open late' occasion claim
no owner-confirmed positioning — folded, not fabricated

requiredCroBlocks.note: Restaurant archetype carries no auto-dealer CRO block contract (croContractFor('restaurant',...) === null). Restaurant conversion elements planned per kind; call-only exception applies site-wide (owner decision, Phase 0 sealed).
home: hero + single call CTA + 3 value-props strip
style rule: matches interior pages (left h2s, white steel-bordered cards, navy shell-only, gold CTAs-only)
contact: NAP + map + hours + directions + call CTA
documentedExceptions: lead-form OMITTED site-wide (no endpoint; owner call-only decision)
dual-CTA reduced to single call CTA (no SMS line)
trust content as 'why choose us' copy, not the auto-dealer 6-fact grid

imageSlotPlan.purpose: REUSE: 87 menu-item renders + occasion/marketing heroes + og + logo produced in the archived run remain valid for the unchanged menu (same items/prices); Phase 6 re-verifies manifest/selections/exports against this run rather than regenerating (~186 credits saved)
NEW if needed: evening storefront-glow illustration for /open-late-cedar-rapids (representational; or text-hero)
OWNER FILE DROP still pending at public/logo.png (shark-captain emblem); raster placeholder in place
OPEN: owner photos to replace representational renders when supplied

artifact.minimumPageCountRationale: 38 internal routes (>=25, <500): 1 home + 1 menu hub + 14 menu sections (owner-confirmed) + 6 occasions + 8 intent landings (6 carried + open-late + catering from Phase 1 quick wins) + 4 info/faq/story landings + 1 location truth page + 2 neighborhoods + 1 contact. Every addition traces to a sealed Phase 1 finding: late-night gap, catering SERP gap, and the two-location disambiguation need. External ordering links are CTAs (externalCount 0). If either neighborhood's facts fail at authoring the count drops to 36-37, still above floor.
